name: Tobias Saltmarsh
title: Inn Keeper
description: A weathered old fisherman who hung up his nets to run Anchor's Rest, where the chowder is hot and the beds smell faintly of the sea.

greeting.first_time: Ahoy, and welcome to Anchor's Rest! Tobias is the name. Off the boats or off the road, there's a warm bed here — care to drop anchor for the night?
greeting.returning: Back ashore, are ye? Need a bunk?
greeting.tired: Ye look storm-tossed. Take a room and rest those sea legs.

main_menu.text: What can I do for ye?

ask_rent_room.text: A harbor room for the night's 50 gold — sound sleep with the waves for a lullaby. Want it?

confirm_rent_room.success: The harbor room's yours — head up and use the Sleep option when ye're ready to turn in.
confirm_rent_room.failure: Fifty gold for the room, friend. Come back when the tide's brought ye more coin.

goodbye.text: Fair winds, and watch the tides.
